name: DefaultValidator
documentation:
Canonical SDK entry point for Fluxzero's Validation implementation.

This validator supports the Jakarta Validation annotations and features used by the SDK, including built-in constraints, custom constraints, groups, cascaded validation, type-use/container validation, executable parameter and return-value validation, metadata lookup, value extractors, and Fluxzero-clock based temporal checks.

It is intentionally not a full standalone Jakarta Validation provider replacement for every TCK edge case: XML mappings, {@code validation.xml}, CDI lifecycle integration, TraversableResolver reachability rules, and full Expression Language message evaluation are outside the supported SDK profile.

fields.name: BEAN_PROPERTY_METHOD_NAMES_ONLY_PROPERTY
fields.documentation:
Application property that switches bean validation for no-argument methods to JavaBean/Hibernate-compatible
 getter naming only. When set to {@code true}, only annotated {@code getX()}, {@code isX()}, and
 {@code hasX()} methods are treated as bean properties. The default is {@code false}, so any annotated
 no-argument method with a return value is validated.

constructors.name: DefaultValidator
constructors.documentation: Creates a validator that uses the current Fluxzero clock for temporal constraints.

constructors.name: DefaultValidator
constructors.documentation:
Creates a validator that obtains its clock from the supplied Jakarta {@link ClockProvider}.

 @param clockProvider provider used for temporal constraints
